scripts.format: oxfmt --write apps examples packages package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.base.json .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check apps examples packages package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.base.json .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json
scripts.check: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
